content.name: AI Influence
content.description: Living-galaxy AI: talk to any NPC in real conversations with memory, dice-driven social checks, real payments and real consequences. NPCs remember you, lie, fear, resent, inform and reach out; factions run LLM-driven diplomacy with real relation changes; a dynamic event generator invents galaxy news that feeds conversations, contracts and the economy; outbreaks, security incidents and obituaries round out a living political RPG. Serverless: requires only the free Player2 app (player2.game) running locally - no bridge, no API keys. Toggle features in-chat with 'dnd off' and 'obits off'.
content.author: Moshine

text.name: AI Influence
text.description: Living-galaxy AI: talk to any NPC in real conversations with memory, dice-driven social checks, real payments and real consequences. NPCs remember you, lie, fear, resent, inform and reach out; factions run LLM-driven diplomacy with real relation changes; a dynamic event generator invents galaxy news that feeds conversations, contracts and the economy; outbreaks, security incidents and obituaries round out a living political RPG. Serverless: requires only the free Player2 app (player2.game) running locally - no bridge, no API keys. Toggle features in-chat with 'dnd off' and 'obits off'.
text.author: Moshine
